description: Composition Blue shirt made of polyester crepe with a soft drape and slight sheen, has a V-neck with ruffle, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tabs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash cold, wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, with a luxe fabric, this shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a feminine ruffle, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
